_publications._publicationTitle: [18F]fluorothymidine and [18F]fluorodeoxyglucose PET Imaging Demonstrates Uptake and Differentiates Growth in Neurofibromatosis 2 Related Vestibular Schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: While use of the TrueV scanner without RM did not demonstrate a significant difference in FLT uptake between rapidly growing and indolent tumors (p > 0.05), use of the TrueV with RM did demonstrate significantly higher FLT SUV mean values
details: With respiratory motion correction, demonstrated significantly higher FLT SUV mean values in rapidly growing tumors (p < 0.05), while without RM did not show significant difference (p > 0.05)
